ogTitle: Wandearah East vs Wandearah West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wandearah East and Wandearah West.
heading: Wandearah East vs Wandearah West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wandearah East, South Australia and Wandearah West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wandearah East has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Wandearah West (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wandearah East or Wandearah West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wandearah East has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Wandearah West scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wandearah East scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Wandearah West scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wandearah East or Wandearah West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wandearah East has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
